visual_description: A man in a light-colored suit and glasses sits at a desk in a dimly lit room, holding a small dark object with both hands. In the background, another man in a striped shirt stands near a doorway, his back to the camera. The view shifts to a close‑up of a gold wristwatch on a dark surface, then a gloved hand reaches toward it, followed by a side view of two men, one in a white shirt and tie looking forward.
audio_description: Silence is audible in the scene.
